title: PM Work-Package Write Surface Integration Smoke
objective: Prove the new work-package POST and PATCH runtime path behaves correctly against a real PostgreSQL-backed environment by seeding the minimum supporting org, work, and identity rows, exercising create and partial update end to end, and confirming bounded validation and cleanup behavior without adding endpoints, changing schemas, or authoring new SQL.
active_role: PM Work-Package Write Surface Integration Smoke Author
constrained_outputs: Real PostgreSQL-backed integration smoke coverage for the existing POST and PATCH work-package handlers

End-to-end evidence that the work-package write surface can create a row, patch a bounded subset of fields, reject a known-bad FK with a 422 merged-error response, and preserve 404 behavior for a missing work package
Focused regression coverage proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-012f, packet-012h, packet-012i, and packet-013 surfaces remain stable after the integration smoke addition
No database-schema changes, no new endpoints, and no broader write-side runtime implementation
validation_steps: Confirm packet 013i touches only integration-smoke coverage for the existing work-package POST and PATCH handlers and does not add new endpoints or broaden mutation scope
Confirm the live runtime path can create a work package, patch a bounded subset of fields, return a merged-field 422 for a known-bad FK, and preserve 404 behavior for a missing work package
Confirm the integration module mirrors the skip-when-unreachable posture used by packets 012g and 012i

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-012f identity joined-read tests, packet-012h org joined-read tests, packet-012i org integration smoke, and packet-013 work-package write tests still pass or skip as expected after the smoke coverage addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 013i is integration-smoke runtime coverage only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader write-surface expansion are authorized.
